# AIGC Portfolio

> AI-powered art gallery and blog template. Zero cost. Zero coding required.

## About

AIGC Portfolio is a production-ready template for deploying an AI art gallery and blog on Cloudflare's free tier. It orchestrates multiple free LLMs (Cloudflare Workers AI, NVIDIA NIM, Google Gemini) via direct API calls — no SDKs, no middleware, no vendor lock-in.

## Architecture

- Framework: Astro 6 (SSR on Cloudflare Workers edge)
- Database: Cloudflare D1 (serverless SQLite)
- Storage: Cloudflare R2 (S3-compatible)
- AI: Multi-provider routing by string prefix (@cf/, @nv/, @google/)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 4
- Auth: Cloudflare Zero Trust (infrastructure-level)
- Dependencies: 9 total (zero React, zero ORMs, zero AI SDKs)

## Features

- Gallery with masonry layout, tag/model filtering, AI auto-tagging via vision models
- Blog with markdown editor and AI copywriting assistance
- Butler: context-aware AI assistant that knows your site content
- Admin panel with CMS, AI settings, content audit, usage monitoring
- Multi-LLM orchestration: switch providers from the dashboard
- Agentic development: ships with .claude/ and .antigravity/ context files

## Source

https://github.com/danielw-sudo/AIGC-portfolio
